texto: The best is to do injustice without paying the penalty
autor: the worst is to suffer it without being able to take revenge. Justice is a mean between these two extremes. People value it not because it is a good but because they are too weak to do injustice with impunity.
explicacao: Citação de the worst is to suffer it without being able to take revenge. Justice is a mean between these two extremes. People value it not because it is a good but because they are too weak to do injustice with impunity. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The best is to do injustice without paying the penalty” articula reflexao, plato, the-republic em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como the-republic.
